promptModal.title: An example prompt to generate a sculpture in this spirit
promptModal.description: Use this prompt as a starting point, then adapt the shapes, colors, materials, or atmosphere to create a more personal artwork.
promptModal.examplePrompt: Create a contemporary papier-mâché wall sculpture inspired by organic and floral relief forms, integrated into a slim black metal frame. The composition should evoke natural movement, with sculptural flowers, undulating leaves, fluid roots, and elegant volumes that seem to emerge from the frame. Refined palette of off-white, vegetal green, patinated gold, and warm brown. High-end handcrafted texture, realistic finish, one-of-a-kind piece, contemporary art gallery aesthetic, soft lighting, strong wall presence, sophisticated and poetic style.
promptModal.tip: Tip: keep the prompt structure, then change the palette, subject, or style to get more varied results.

metadata.title: About
metadata.description: Discover the world of Marcos Suarez, an artist specializing in papier-mâché sculpture, where material, light and contemporary creation meet.

hero.title: Discover the Art of Marcos Suarez
hero.description: A universe where recycled material, sculpture and light engage in dialogue through a handcrafted and contemporary aesthetic.
hero.imageAlt: Marcos Suarez in his artistic universe

approach.title: From material to expression
paragraphs: Marcos Suarez, originally from Havana, develops an artistic practice centered on papier-mâché sculpture, the transformation of material and the creation of objects with a strong visual presence.

His journey began at a very young age through handmade creations in cardboard and paper, sold in Cuba’s tourist markets. This early sensitivity to the crafted object gradually evolved into a more sculptural, more contemporary and more personal exploration.

Today, each work explores the dialogue between organic forms, textures, recycling and light. Whether it is a wall sculpture, a lamp or a functional object, each piece is conceived as a meeting point between poetry, material and emotion.
approach.imageAlt: Functional papier-mâché sculpture by Marcos Suarez

values.title: A practice between art, material and emotion
values.description: Each creation is born from close attention to form, texture and the atmosphere a piece can bring into a space.

items.title: Contemporary craftsmanship
items.text: Each piece is conceived as a singular sculptural presence, between handcraft, formal research and contemporary sensibility.

items.title: Transformed materials
items.text: Papier-mâché and recycled materials become works of character—poetic, textured and lasting.

items.title: Custom creations
items.text: Some pieces are born from a dialogue with the client, imagining a sculpture, a lamp or a sculptural object designed for a specific place.

interiors.title: My sculptures in real interiors
interiors.description1: Discover how certain pieces find their place in real living spaces. Each creation interacts with its environment and becomes a singular presence within the home.
interiors.description2: Wall sculptures, sculptural lamps or functional objects: each work integrates in a unique way into the world of those who choose it.

images.livingRoomAlt: A Marcos Suarez sculpture integrated into a living room
images.wallAlt: A sculptural lamp by Marcos Suarez in an interior
images.contemporaryAlt: A Marcos Suarez artwork integrated into a contemporary interior
images.quote: Each piece transforms the space and creates an artistic presence in everyday life.

hero.title: A work designed especially for you
hero.description: Each custom creation is born from a dialogue between material, intuition and intention. The goal is to design a singular piece in harmony with your interior, your sensitivity and your project.

steps.title: Share your idea
steps.description: Describe your desire, your space, your inspirations or the emotion you would like to bring to life.

steps.title: Define the artistic direction
steps.description: We discuss the forms, materials, dimensions and aesthetic intention of the piece.

steps.title: Bring the work to life
steps.description: The sculpture is handcrafted through a sensitive and contemporary artisanal approach.

approach.title: A handcrafted, poetic and contemporary practice
approach.description: Each project is approached as a search for form, presence and emotion. Recycled material becomes language, the hand sets the rhythm, and the final piece finds its place between sculpture, object and memory.

values: A unique piece designed for your world
Recycled materials and a responsible approach

contact.title: Let’s talk about your future creation
contact.description: Describe your idea, your space or simply your intention. Every project is a collaboration.

AboutArtist.title: Marcos Suárez, between material, light and transformation
AboutArtist.paragraph1: Through papier-mâché, light and recycled materials, Marcos Suárez develops a sensitive sculptural language where handcrafted gesture meets a contemporary aesthetic.
AboutArtist.paragraph2: Each piece is born from a process of research, texture and transformation. Handwork, organic finishes and the presence of light bring unique works to life, conceived as sculptural presences.
AboutArtist.imageAlt: Marcos Suárez working on a papier-mâché sculpture in his studio

AIExperience.title: Imagine your sculpture before bringing it to life.
AIExperience.description: Describe your idea, choose an artistic direction, configure your artwork (size, frame, materials), generate a visual concept and transform it into a custom-made sculpture.

form.label: Describe your idea
form.placeholder: Ex. An organic white wall sculpture with golden accents, inspired by the movement of waves, elegant and contemporary.
form.withFrameDescription: Integrated into a thin open frame, where the sculpture interacts with the structure without being enclosed.

organic.label: Organic
organic.prompt: contemporary papier-mâché wall sculpture, fluid organic forms, elegant sculptural relief, premium handcrafted composition

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.prompt: contemporary papier-mâché wall sculpture, clean lines, refined minimalist composition, restrained and elegant relief

oceanic.label: Oceanic
oceanic.prompt: contemporary papier-mâché wall sculpture, ocean-inspired forms, fluid movement, organic relief evoking waves and currents

luminous.label: Luminous
luminous.prompt: contemporary papier-mâché wall sculpture, subtle luminous presence, elegant relief, refined light-inspired accents

origami.label: Origami
origami.prompt: contemporary papier-mâché wall sculpture inspired by origami, folded geometric planes, crisp sculptural facets, elegant structured composition

result.emptyDescription: Generate a first vision of your future sculpture, then refine it before bringing it to life in the workshop.

footer.line1: Each generated concept serves as a visual base. The final sculpture is then handcrafted in the studio, with a sensitive and fully custom approach.

ContactPage.description: For a custom order, an artistic collaboration or a question about a work, this page is conceived as a direct, clear and elegant point of contact.

process.title: From the initial idea to sculptural presence.

step1.title: 1. First exchange
step1.text: You share your intention, your space or your inspiration.

step2.title: 2. Artistic direction
step2.text: A visual and sculptural approach is defined according to your project.

step3.title: 3. Feasibility study
step3.text: Dimensions, materials, finishes and timing are considered.

step4.title: 4. Custom creation
step4.text: Each piece is conceived with a handcrafted and contemporary dimension.
